label: Ritual position (claimed bed)
description: Places the pawn in the bed claimed by the specified other pawn's role.

ofPawn.label: Of pawn
ofPawn.description: Role ID of the pawn whose claimed bed should be used.

tryClaimIfNoneClaimed.label: Try claim if none claimed
tryClaimIfNoneClaimed.description: If true, tries to claim a bed if the pawn does not already have one claimed.
